attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_NAME, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.VALIDATION_TYPE, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.PROTECTED_FLAG, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.SECURITY_ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.LONGLIST_FLAG, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.FORMAT_TYPE, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.MAXIMUM_SIZE, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.ALPHANUMERIC_ALLOWED_FLAG, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.UPPERCASE_ONLY_FLAG, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.NUMERIC_MODE_ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.DEPENDANT_DEFAULT_VALUE, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.DEPENDANT_DEFAULT_MEANING, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.PARENT_FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.MINIMUM_VALUE, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.MAXIMUM_VALUE, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.NUMBER_PRECISION, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS,
 (
 select FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS
 minus
 select FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS)
